mano_cua.result_summary: Bug confirmed via source code analysis. In checkForUpdateOf() (packages/devtools/src/npm/index.ts), getPackageInfo() uses only require.resolve.paths(name) to locate the package. In monorepo or hoisted setups, this fails to find nuxt package → returns null → version number not displayed on dashboard. Fix commit adds nuxt.options.modulesDir to search paths.
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Buggy code: getPackageInfo(name, { paths: require.resolve.paths(name) || undefined }). Fix code: adds [...nuxt.options.modulesDir, ...require.resolve.paths(name) || []] as modulePaths. The buggy version's limited resolve paths cannot find the package in monorepo/hoisted node_modules layouts, causing version display to fail silently.
